Event: Magic Well - March 2025
Event Date: 07/03/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: A205


Other locations the gear can be found
Adventurer Challenge
Magic Well Junk Chest
Starry Sky Artifact

Triggers: Once in a while

Harsh Blizzard
A hurricane sweeps across the battlefield. When hurricane passes through allies, they gain a shield that absorbs 500000 damage. The shield lasts for 4 sec. When hurricane passes through frozen allies, it additionally casts restoration on them. The unit removes a random debuff and restores 150000 health. It also increases the ally's damage by 50% and health by 30% for 4 sec.
When hurricane passes through enemies, it deals 175000 magic damage to them and has a 35% chance to freeze them for 3 sec. During this time, the frozen unit cannot move or attack. It also increases the cooldown of the target's gear and artifact abilities by 3 sec. When hurricane passes through frozen enemies, it casts a deep freeze effect on them for 3 sec.
During this time, the frozen unit cannot move or attack, and the cooldown time of all their abilities (except those granted by the set equipped) is increased by 3 sec.
When the deep freeze effect wears off, the target of the ability explodes and takes 200000 magic damage, and icicles fly out of them and into 2 nearby enemies. On hit, icicles deal 250000 magic damage, increase the cooldown time of the target's gear and artifact abilities by 3 sec, and cast stiffness on them. The attack speed of stiffened units is reduced by 45% for 3 sec.

Requirements: 90-100
